nodes.label: AI as double-checker and second pair of eyes
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or hallucinating source
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as an assistant that can double check my work and provide me a new perspective

nodes.label: AI for systematic comparison and negotiation
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to help create a chart to compare all units, and used AI to help figure out which upgrades, parts, and accessories are actually relevant

nodes.label: AI for fact-checking and logical consistency
nodes.grounding_span: AI is also used for fact-checking and ensuring what the researcher claims aligns logically with their results

nodes.label: Human handling of sensitive interpersonal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer personally writing emails or arranging meetings to break the bad news to users

nodes.label: AI use bounded by data privacy constraints
nodes.label_negative: AI access to sensitive research data
nodes.grounding_span: I often have to resort to manually analyzing the data or running analysis on my own programs due to data privacy concerns

nodes.label: Collaborative task decomposition with AI
nodes.label_negative: Delegating entire tasks to AI independently
nodes.grounding_span: I would break down complex tasks into smaller portions and use AI to aid me bit-by-bit

nodes.label: AI as supplement not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI replacing human skills and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as a supplement to make my work better and further our research as opposed to do my work for me

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: ensuring what the researcher claims aligns logically with their results

nodes.label: Cost efficiency and resource optimization
nodes.grounding_span: we were able to save tens of thousands of dollars with this method

nodes.label: Interpersonal trust and nuanced communication
nodes.grounding_span: I know how best to deal with each individual person

nodes.label: Data privacy and security
nodes.grounding_span: we cannot take the risk of the data being incorporated into AI training datasets

nodes.label: Human expertise and critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: we need to be creative, maintain good people-skills, and be able to critically think

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI in equipment negotiation
nodes.grounding_span: we were able to save tens of thousands of dollars with this method, and purchased equipment that many of our users were very happy with

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination on recent citations
nodes.grounding_span: the AI model I used struggled heavily, hallucinating information, presenting inaccuracies, and ultimately failing to provide the help I expected

nodes.label: Positive recommendation of AI to colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: I actually actively recommend colleagues to try incorporating AI into their work

nodes.label: Confidence in maintaining human skills alongside AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have been able to increase my overall work efficiency without sacrificing any human aspects

nodes.label: Systematic task decomposition into sub-tasks
